languages.text: "Ваша Светлость говорит об Альве-9 — командире вражеского отряда? Сожаления беспочвенны. Функционал сей шестерни в машине {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} будет частично восстановлен путем создания {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}сервочерепа{/g} соответствующей конструкции — я обработаю останки и превращу их в слугу Бога-Машины. Этого достаточно для адепта, неспособного отличить Истину Омниссии от ереси".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость говорит о единице "Альва-9" — командире вражеского отряда? Сожаления беспочвенны. Функционал сей шестерни в машине {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} будет частично восстановлен путём создания {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}сервочерепа{/g} соответствующей конструкции — я обработаю останки и превращу их в слугу Бога-Машины. Этого достаточно для адепта, неспособного отличить Истину Омниссии от ереси".

languages.text: "Is Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} referring to Alva-9 — the enemy commander? Regrets are unwarranted. The functionality of the cog in the grand machine of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} will be partially restored by creating a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} of a suitable construction. I will process the remains and turn them into a servant of the Machine God. This is sufficient for an adept incapable of distinguishing the Omnissiah's Truth from heresy."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость говорит об Альве-9 — командире вражеского отряда? Сожаления беспочвенны. languages.text: 「質問：貴{mf|卿|女卿}はアルバ-9を指しているのですか。後悔は不必要です。適切な構造のサーボスカルを作成することで、そのユニットの機能の一部が回復します。これは、異端と神聖なる真理を区別できない熟練者にとって十分です」
languages.original_text: "Question: is Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} referring unit Alva-9? Regrets are unwarranted. The functionality of the unit will be partially restored by creating a servo-skull of a suitable construction. This is sufficient for an adept incapable of distinguishing the Omnissiah's Truth from heresy."

traits.locale_text: 「質問：貴{mf|卿|女卿}はアルバ-9を指しているのですか。後悔は不必要です。適切な構造のサーボスカルを作成することで、そのユニットの機能の一部が回復します。これは、異端と神聖なる真理を区別できない熟練者にとって十分です。」

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, düşman komutanı olan Alva-9 birimini mi kastetmekte? Pişmanlık yersiz. {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} büyük makinesindeki dişlinin işlevselliği, uygun bir yapıya sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}hizmelet{/g} oluşturularak kısmen geri yüklenecek. Kalıntıları işleyip onları Makine Tanrı'nın bir hizmetkârına dönüştüreceğim. Bu, Hermesih'in Hakikat'i ile kâfirlik arasındaki farkı ayırt edemeyen bir üstat için yeterli olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "Is Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} referring to Alva-9 — the enemy commander? Regrets are unwarranted. The functionality of the cog in the grand machine of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} will be partially restored by creating a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} of a suitable construction. I will process the remains and turn them into a servant of the Machine God. This is sufficient for an adept incapable of distinguishing the Omnissiah's Truth from heresy."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, düşman komutanı olan Alva-9 birimini mi kastetmekte? Pişmanlık yersiz. {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} büyük makinesindeki dişlinin işlevselliği, uygun bir yapıya sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}hizmelet{/g} oluşturularak kısmen geri yüklenecek. Kalıntıları işleyip onları Makine Tanrı'nın bir hizmetkârına dönüştüreceğim. Bu, Hermesih'in Hakikat'i ile kâfirlik arasındaki farkı ayırt edemeyen bir üstat için yeterli olacaktır."

languages.text: «¿Se refiere mi{mf|lord|lady} a la unidad Alva-9, la comandante enemiga? En ese caso, huelgan las lamentaciones. La funcionalidad de un engranaje en la gran máquina del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} se restablecerá parcialmente mediante la creación de un {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g} de diseño apropiado. Procesaré los restos y los convertiré en un sirviente de Dios Máquina. Será más que suficiente para una adepta incapaz de distinguir entre la verdad del Omnissiah y una abyecta herejía».
languages.original_text: "Is Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} referring to Alva-9 — the enemy commander? Regrets are unwarranted. The functionality of the cog in the grand machine of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} will be partially restored by creating a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} of a suitable construction. I will process the remains and turn them into a servant of the Machine God. This is sufficient for an adept incapable of distinguishing the Omnissiah's Truth from heresy."

traits.locale_text: «¿Se refiere mi{mf|lord|lady} a la unidad Alva-9, la comandante enemiga? En ese caso, huelgan las lamentaciones. La funcionalidad de un engranaje en la gran máquina del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} se restablecerá parcialmente mediante la creación de un {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g} de diseño apropiado. Procesaré los restos y los convertiré en un sirviente de Dios Máquina. Será más que suficiente para una adepta incapaz de distinguir entre la verdad del Omnissiah y una abyecta herejía».

languages.text: “大人所指是否为阿尔瓦-9，即敌方指挥官？您无需感到遗憾。通过构造适宜的{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}，这一{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}伟大机械中的‘齿轮’功能将得到部分恢复。我会处理其遗骸，将其转化为万机之神的仆从。对于一名无力辨别欧姆尼赛亚真理与异端言论的助祭而言，这已足够。”
languages.original_text: "Is Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} referring to Alva-9 — the enemy commander? Regrets are unwarranted. The functionality of the cog in the grand machine of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} will be partially restored by creating a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} of a suitable construction. I will process the remains and turn them into a servant of the Machine God. This is sufficient for an adept incapable of distinguishing the Omnissiah's Truth from heresy."

traits.locale_text: “大人所指是否为阿尔瓦-9，即敌方指挥官？您无需感到遗憾。通过构造适宜的{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}，这一{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}伟大机械中的‘齿轮’功能将得到部分恢复。我会处理其遗骸，将其转化为万机之神的仆从。对于一名无力辨别欧姆尼赛亚真理与异端言论的助祭而言，这已足够。”

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie fait-elle référence à l'unité Alva-9... le commandant ennemi ? Les regrets la concernant sont injustifiés. La fonctionnalité de ce rouage dans la grande machine de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} sera partiellement rétablie par la création d'un {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} de facture adéquate. Je vais traiter son cadavre et la transformer en servante du Dieu-Machine. C'est amplement suffisant pour une adepte incapable de distinguer la vérité de l'Omnimessie de l'hérésie pure et simple. »
languages.original_text: "Is Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} referring to Alva-9 — the enemy commander? Regrets are unwarranted. The functionality of the cog in the grand machine of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} will be partially restored by creating a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} of a suitable construction. I will process the remains and turn them into a servant of the Machine God. This is sufficient for an adept incapable of distinguishing the Omnissiah's Truth from heresy."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie fait-elle référence à l'unité Alva-9... le commandant ennemi ? Les regrets la concernant sont injustifiés. La fonctionnalité de ce rouage dans la grande machine de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} sera partiellement rétablie par la création d'un {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} de facture adéquate. Je vais traiter son cadavre et la transformer en servante du Dieu-Machine. C'est amplement suffisant pour une adepte incapable de distinguer la vérité de l'Omnimessie de l'hérésie pure et simple. »

languages.text: "Beziehen sich Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} auf Einheit Alva-9 — die feindliche Kommandeurin? Bedauern ist unangebracht. Die Funktionalität des Zahnrades in der großen Maschine des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} wird partiell durch den Bau eines geeigneten {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädels{/g} wiederhergestellt. Ich werde die Reste verarbeiten und zu Dienern des Maschinengottes machen. Das reicht für eine Adeptin aus, die die Wahrheit des Omnissiah nicht von Ketzerei unterscheiden kann."
